## Return Value

An Adam optimizer.

Sets [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/beta1] to `0.9`, [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/beta2] to `0.999`, [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/epsilon] to `1e-8`, [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/usesAMSGrad] to `false`, and [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/timeStep] to `1` by default.

# init(descriptor:)

**Initializer**

Creates an Adam optimizer with the descriptor you specify.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(descriptor optimizerDescriptor: MLCOptimizerDescriptor)
```

## Parameters

- **optimizerDescriptor**: An object for configuring the optimizer.

## Return Value

An Adam optimizer.

## Discussion

Sets [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/beta1] to `0.9`, [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/beta2] to `0.999`, [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/epsilon] to `1e-8`, [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/usesAMSGrad] to `false`, and [doc://com.apple.mlcompute/documentation/MLCompute/MLCAdamOptimizer/timeStep] to `1` by default.

## Creating an Adam Optimizer

- **init(descriptor:beta1:beta2:epsilon:timeStep:)**: Creates an Adam optimizer with the values you specify.
- **init(descriptor:beta1:beta2:epsilon:usesAMSGrad:timeStep:)**: Creates an Adam optimizer with the values you specify.
